LanguageData.Turret_Blaster.label: charge blaster auto-turret
LanguageData.Turret_Blaster.description: Automatic turret equipped with a charge blaster.
LanguageData.Turret_Heavy.label: heavy auto-turret
LanguageData.Turret_Heavy.description: Plated automatic turret equiped with a high caliber machine gun. Very resistant to damage.
LanguageData.Turret_Medium.label: medium auto-turret
LanguageData.Turret_Medium.description: Automatic turret equiped with a full powered cartridge machine gun. Fairly resistant to damage.
LanguageData.Turret_KPV.label: KPV machine gun
LanguageData.Turret_KPV.description: KPV heavy machine gun mounted on a tripod.
LanguageData.Turret_M240B.label: M240B
LanguageData.Turret_M240B.description: M240B medium machine gun mounted on a tripod.
LanguageData.Turret_AGSThirty.label: AGS-30
LanguageData.Turret_AGSThirty.description: Lightweight automatic grenade launcher mounted on a tripod.
LanguageData.Turret_Flak.label: 90mm flak turret
LanguageData.Turret_Flak.description: Old school anti-aircraft cannon. Ineffective against modern aviation but still popular on rimworlds for use against entrenched enemies and vehicles.
